sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106246" key="u(grome/leia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑγρο-μέλεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n106246.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suppleness of limb,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
